title: Canvas 2D commit graph renderer (10k+ commits, 60fps)
description: Spike B: Build a Canvas 2D commit graph renderer that can handle 10k+ commits at 60fps. Validates the highest-risk architecture decision. Must prove: DAG layout algorithm, virtual scrolling, branch coloring, Canvas 2D sufficiency.
close_reason: Shipped: all 18 PRD criteria met. Canvas 2D renderer handles 10k+ commits at 60fps with virtual scrolling, DAG layout, branch coloring, ref labels, and keyboard navigation.

title: Bundled Git Binary Strategy Spike
description: Validate a reliable bundled-Git execution strategy for write operations on macOS. System git with version gate (>=2.35) for Foundation phase, custom resolver function for path resolution, error dialog for missing/old git. Spike validates architecture decision for MVP.
close_reason: Shipped: all 5 PRD tasks pass (error variants, resolver module, cli refactor, integration test, strategy doc). 40/40 tests pass, cargo check/clippy clean. Review: 0 critical, 4 important auto-fixed, 2 deferred (logging, mock seam).

title: MVP Branch Operations on Hybrid Git Engine
description: Production-facing branch operations for MVP: create, switch, delete (safe + force), fetch, pull, push (with --force-with-lease). Uses CLI write-path via GitResolver (depends on bd-2na). Origin-only remote scope for MVP. System git credential delegation. Structured error mapping for frontend consumption.
close_reason: Shipped: all 6 PRD tasks pass (BranchOpError enum, delete pre-flight, fetch/pull/push async, Tauri commands, failure-mode tests, full verification). 71/71 tests pass, 0 clippy warnings. Review fix applied for create/switch error routing.
